scenario.name: UAC expect reject (4xx)
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[target_domain] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "uac" <sip:uac@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[target_domain]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:uac@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp-UAC-e2e Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=uac 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[service]@[target_domain] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "uac" <sip:uac@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[target_domain]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
